name: Share Your OS Migration Story | openEuler
description: Help others by sharing your openEuler migration experiences. Contribute best practices, follow our guides, and make migration smoother for everyone.

name: How to Contribute Your OS Migration Best Practices to openEuler
description: A step-by-step guide for sharing your openEuler migration experiences as best practices or migration cases with the openEuler Migration Center.

step.name: Publish Your Migration Best Practices
step.text: Publish your migration best practices or porting guides in the openEuler blog pages. Be sure to include keywords in your title, like

step.name: Receive Approval from Compatibility SIG
step.text: If your blog is selected as a best practice or porting guide, the Compatibility SIG responds with

step.name: Publication in Migration Center
step.text: Once approved, the openDesign SIG publishes the blog in the openEuler Migration Center for the community to benefit from.
